completion_formula: minimum(mandatory source, requirement, artifact, test_or_waiver, evidence, connected_staging, production, acceptance gate percentages)

blocks.name: Truth denominator and persistent Knowledge Fabric
blocks.exit_gate: Connected source graph, complete denominator and no-gaps verifier

blocks.name: Sovereign control plane, security and operations
blocks.exit_gate: Connected policies plus proven provider-side recovery

blocks.name: Model router, intelligence fabric and capability sourcing
blocks.exit_gate: Authorised live provider panel and current-source evidence

blocks.name: Command Centre and operator UX
blocks.exit_gate: Authenticated deployed staging dashboard and complete operator journeys

blocks.name: Automation, integration and persistence
blocks.exit_gate: Connected canaries with retry, replay and rollback evidence

blocks.name: CFO, trading research, revenue and product domains
blocks.exit_gate: Expanded services and approved connected staging proof

blocks.name: External P0 recovery and provider gates
blocks.exit_gate: Each task DONE_VERIFIED or explicit owner-accepted blocker

blocks.name: Full staging federation
blocks.exit_gate: Critical connected paths pass end-to-end and DR tests

blocks.name: Final reconciliation and owner acceptance
blocks.exit_gate: All in-scope items verified or owner-waived

passes.name: Historical bounded batches
passes.remaining: Process every newly accessible source and preserve inaccessible sources as pending or blocked

next_safe_pass.name: Authorised connected model pilot and UI staging proof
micro_slices: inventory configured models without exposing secrets
run authenticated Command Centre operator and accessibility tests
next_safe_pass.blocker: Provider environment, credential references, budget and explicit execution approval required

truth_boundary: Repository-local and deterministic completion is bounded. It is not complete connected staging, production, universal source coverage or owner acceptance.
